short_text: Milne to Bairstow, Caught by Williamson!! That's the end of Bairstow! That is a spellbinder from Williamson! Bairstow le
full_text: Milne to Bairstow, Caught by Williamson!! That's the end of Bairstow! That is a spellbinder from Williamson! Bairstow leans into a cover drive, crunching this flat towards cover, where Williamson dives to the left and forward to take this. They're having a look at this - the soft signal is OUT! The third umpire just needs one look at it, and says "I'm ready with my decision" before the big screen reads "O-U-T". Bairstow has to walk back for 13, and just when it was starting to look like the rub of the green was going England's way, New Zealand have conjured something out of thin air.

full_text: Woakes to Williamson, Caught by Rashid!! The dot balls forced the New Zealand skipper to do something different and he's perished in the process.
